description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The facade features large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The front includes a wooden deck with outdoor seating, bordered by landscaped greenery and several trees. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or tan material, likely stucco or concrete, with some sections clad in wood or composite panels. The house sits on a concrete base with a small lawn and paved areas, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, functional living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a wooden deck surrounded by landscaped greenery. The design is minimalist and contemporary, featuring light-colored walls and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, wooden deck with seating, and landscaped greenery with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, solid wall sections, and the transition from the deck to the paved and grassy areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more glass windows and doors, as well as the continuation of the deck and surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall, upper balcony, and additional landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide glass door, wooden deck steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaped greenery.
